reviews.review_description:
TLDR: This app sucks. It's a clunky, laggy, poorly built and designed game. Don't download this. Full review below...

How could someone make this bad of a game? I know people can be new to 3D game software like Unity (which is used here), But even a 4 year old could make a better game. I'm surprised how
1st. There's no sounds I heard at all.
2nd. Hasn't been updated in ages and nobody plays this.
3rd. The developer picked the wrong app category and had this labeled 2D instead of VR. So this heap of junk shows to everybody who's searching for 2D apps.

I tried to play it and here's my ratings.

PrePlaying
App was pretty lightweight surprisingly and downloaded fast. The banner is terrible and you get flashed by a bright purple screen on startup. Not a good start...

Gameplay 1/10 "Clinically Bad"
When you load in, your met with two buttons. One you can't even press! Why even give me the option if it's "Coming soon"??? Just put a banner up somewhere and automatically launch into horror mode. Also to mention... I couldn't even play this at all. The computer is clunky. I noticed here you can't use joystick turning at all since I can't access the computer! I went down this like wooden hallway just to be met by a WALL. I couldn't progress and I didn't know how to. Terrible first time experience.

Graphics 1/10 "Worse than your grandma's old pc"
When you load in and have the two options, you can see everything. Even the sky box. Wouldn't you think to separate this into a enclosed are and not a janky plane? You can see the package the creator used to add "Gorilla tag" physics, by the two balls where your hands are supposed to be before you connect. After you connect, you get a really janky monkey model. You can even see the body in your headset and it gets super annoying quick. I couldn't even add more topics here. I give up.

Afterthought
Don't download this. At all. This junk will stay in your library until Mark Zuckerberg becomes human. (never) Jokes aside, still don't download this. The game's website was built really poorly, like this "studio" is trying to make everything they publish suck. In fact, almost all of these Gorilla Tag spinoffs are just lazy cash grabs!!! They stay popular for a millisecond and die out. After it dies out it stays on the store FOREVER. Please don't play these spinoffs if they don't have good reviews (psa: check if the reviews are from young kids! most spinoffs bribe users with 5 star rating for rewards!)

Meta employees, if you are reading this. Please rid this app of your store. It's useless clunk that's janky.
